title: Milestone scorecard
description: Per-milestone scorecard that records the state of every lane in scope, the lane's commitment class for the current cutline, the DRI and evidence owner for that lane, any active backup-owner waiver, and the evidence links backing the current status. Pairs with artifacts/governance/ownership_matrix.yaml (the owner registry), artifacts/governance/commitment_classes.yaml (the class vocabulary), and artifacts/governance/milestone_scorecard_template.yaml (the template instance).

milestone_id.description: Milestone identifier used by the program, e.g. a roadmap slug. Do not leak planning-only IDs into product surfaces.

lanes.description: One entry per lane in scope. Every entry MUST resolve to an id in ownership_matrix.scorecard_lane_index.

lane_id.description: MUST match a value in ownership_matrix.scorecard_lane_index.

commitment_class.description: Commitment class for this lane in the current milestone cutline.

owner.description: Primary DRI for the lane. Required on every row; no silent blanks.

backup_owner.description: Backup owner. Required for protected lanes unless backup_waiver is cited.

backup_waiver.description: Waiver id from ownership_matrix.waivers, required when the lane is protected and backup_owner is null.

evidence_owner.description: Named evidence owner for the proof that supports this lane's class and status. May equal owner.

requirement_ids.description: Canonical requirement ids from artifacts/governance/requirement_register_seed.yaml that this lane currently substantiates, narrows, or blocks. Use canonical ids only; local packet labels and aliases are non-authoritative.

evidence.description: Evidence links supporting the current status. May be empty while status is not_started or waived.

waiver_refs.description: Other active waivers influencing this lane (fitness-function waivers, public-truth waivers). IDs resolve against ownership_matrix.waivers.
